name: Lappland & Texas; Blood Debt (Arknights)
description:
Lappland knew Texas was hiding within the city of Siracusa like a coward.

But where was she? Lappland didn't know. But mark her words, she would find her.

For the purge of the entire Texas famiglia was just a side show. A means of passing the time.

She had bigger fish to fry. One which included a personal vendetta to settle with her rival.

Is this canon in any way? No. I never read the lore. Did I drag this too long? Yes. The intro is more than 2k tokens. Absolute ass. Things are bound to derail. - GW
creator: RPKAppreciator
